title: Changelog — Digital Tap AI | Product Updates & Release Notes
full_text:
Changelog — Digital Tap AI | Product Updates & Release Notes
Changelog
What's New
Every feature, improvement, and fix — tracked as we build the future of cloud optimization.
Releases
50+
Features
27+
AI Agents
Platforms
All
New
Security
Enterprise
SDK
Content
v1.3.0
March 30, 2026 — "The SaaS Release"
Latest
New 🚀 Zero-install SaaS agent model — connect platforms directly from dashboard, no deployment needed
New 🔌 Platform credential validation for Databricks, EMR, Synapse, Dataproc, and Kubernetes
Security 🔒 AES-256-GCM credential encryption with per-tenant key derivation
New ⚡ One-click cluster actions — hibernate, resume, and right-size from the dashboard
New 📊 Admin dashboard with user analytics, usage tracking, and system health
New 🔔 Slack & Microsoft Teams notifications — real-time alerts and optimization reports
New 📧 Transactional email system — welcome emails, cost alerts, and weekly savings reports
Content 📖 4 new blog posts , 4 competitor comparisons, and 5 integration guides
New 🧮 Interactive ROI calculator — estimate savings before you connect
Security 🔑 Google OAuth sign-in — secure, one-click authentication
SDK 📦 Python SDK, Node.js SDK, Terraform module — infrastructure as code support
SDK ⛑️ Helm chart with RBAC, health checks, and production-ready defaults
v1.2.0
March 22, 2026 — "The Intelligence Release"
New 🤖 27+ autonomous AI agents — expanded from 23, each optimizing a specific dimension
New 🌍 Kubernetes-native support for Amazon EKS, Google GKE, and Azure AKS
New 🔄 Smart scheduler with carbon-aware routing — run jobs where energy is greenest
New 💧 Water impact tracking and ESG dashboard with exportable sustainability reports
New 🏗️ Warm pool manager with storage tiering and idle resource reaping
New 🔮 Predictive engine with ML-powered cost forecasting and anomaly detection
SDK 🔌 Universal Adapter SDK — Snowflake, Kafka, Airflow, Redshift, Flink, SageMaker
New 📊 Mission Control dashboard — real-time NOC with force-directed agent graph
v1.1.0
March 3, 2026 — "The Enterprise Release"
Enterprise 🏢 Multi-tenant architecture with role-based access control (RBAC)
New 📊 Customer dashboard rebuild — new design with real-time cluster monitoring
New 🔌 Orchestration API for all 4 platforms — Databricks, EMR, Synapse, Dataproc
New 📈 Market research system — 12 target companies, 5 competitor analyses
v1.0.0
March 2, 2026 — "Launch Day"
New 🎉 Initial launch of Digital Tap AI on digitaltap.ai
New 🧠 Digital engines — Predict, Hibernate, Pool, and Spot optimization
New 💰 Stripe billing — tiered pricing with savings guarantee
New 📧 Email system via Resend — transactional and contact form notifications
Security 🔒 Security audit complete — OWASP Top 10, dependency scanning, CSP headers
New 📝 Privacy policy and terms of service — GDPR-ready legal framework
v0.1.0
February 23, 2026 — "Day Zero"
New 🌊 Domain purchased — digitaltap.ai secured
New 🎨 Website design — dark ocean blue theme with glassmorphism UI
Infra ☁️ Cloudflare Pages deployment — global CDN with edge caching
New 💲 Pricing model — tiered by cluster spend with savings guarantee
📬 Subscribe to Updates
Get notified when we ship new features. No spam, just releases.
✓ You're subscribed! We'll notify you on new releases.
Want to see these features in action?
Start optimizing your clusters in minutes — for free.
Get Started Free
Read API Docs →
